blocks.text: Match preview: India Women U19 face Sri Lanka Women U19 in 1st unofficial ODI (ODI) on Tue, 30 Jun, 2026, 9:00 am at Cricket Association Puducherry Siechem Ground Puducherry. Full pitch report, weather forecast, and squad details below.

rows: India Women U19 vs Sri Lanka Women U19
Sri Lanka Women U19 tour of India 2026
Cricket Association Puducherry Siechem Ground Puducherry

blocks.text: Standard ODI surface expected. Conditions will be clearer at the toss — monitor team selection and dew factor for night games.
Expected par score: 250–290 runs par score.
Light drizzle · High 35°C / Low 27°C · Rain: 0.1 mm · Wind: up to 19 km/h. Light rain possible — overcast conditions could assist swing bowling early.
International playing XI is announced at the toss. Check back on match day for confirmed line-ups.
